'''Weytta''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Weytta system/Legends|Weytta system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], near [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Roan Shryne]] and his parents, [[Jula Shryne|Jula]] and [[Jen Shryne|Jen]].

{{Planet-stub}}
